---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: blog-listing
    contents: blog/posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    fields: [date, title, description]
---

::: {.hero-banner}

# Building Computational Tools for Biological Discovery

Multi-omics pipeline developer focused on pharmacogenomics, brain 
transcriptomics, and reproducible bioinformatics — using open-access 
data and modern ML/integration methods.

**Current project:** PsychPGx-MultiOmics — pharmacogenomic stratification 
of psychiatric brain RNA-seq using MOFA2, XGBoost + SHAP, and VAE benchmarking.

[View Projects](projects/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[GitHub](https://github.com/codymgeoffroy){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
[LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/cody-geoffroy){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

---

## Featured Work

:::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### PsychPGx-MultiOmics
Pharmacogenomic stratification of psychiatric brain transcriptomics using 
SMRI open-access data. Integrates CYP2D6/CYP2C19 activity scores with 
multi-region RNA-seq and scATAC-seq through MOFA2, DIABLO, and supervised ML.

**Tech:** PharmCAT · DESeq2 · MOFA2 · XGBoost · PyTorch · Docker

[View All Phases →](projects/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Research Background
Undergraduate research in molecular neuroscience and bioinformatics — 
including synaptic proteomics, neuronal culture modeling, and computational 
coursework projects in genomics and systems biology.

[Learn More →](research.qmd)
:::

::::

---

## Recent Posts

Insights from multi-omics analysis, pipeline development, and computational 
biology problem-solving.

::: {#blog-listing}
:::

[View All Posts →](blog/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
